prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Fall protection, part of the Safety & Rigging scope. The observed field condition is: frayed/burned webbing. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140.
title: Compliance check: Fall protection (residential job)
